data.title: Only Best Move
data.statement:
You are playing a Connect-4 game. Given the current board state, find the only column where dropping your stone will result in an immediate win.
Forming a connected line of 4 or more of your stones horizontally, vertically, or diagonally is considered a win.

testCases.title: Jackpot!
testCases.testIn:
o.....o
o.....o
xo...ox
ox...xo
oox.xoo
xxx.xxx

data.constraints:
The board is always valid and exactly 6 rows by 7 columns.
There is guaranteed to be exactly one winning column.
0 ≤ [[C]] ≤ 6
data.inputDescription: <<6 lines:>> A string of length 7 representing each row of the board from top to bottom. Characters can be {{.}} for an empty cell, {{x}} for your stone, or {{o}} for the opponent's stone.
data.outputDescription: <<Line 1:>> An integer [[C]] representing the column index (from 0 to 6, left to right) where you must play to win the game in one move.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You are playing a Connect-4 game. Given the current board state, find the only column where dropping your stone will result in an immediate win.
Forming a connected line of 4 or more of your stones horizontally, vertically, or diagonally is considered a win.
Input
6 lines: A string of length 7 representing each row of the board from top to bottom. Characters can be . for an empty cell, x for your stone, or o for the opponent's stone.
Output
Line 1: An integer C representing the column index (from 0 to 6, left to right) where you must play to win the game in one move.
Constraints
The board is always valid and exactly 6 rows by 7 columns.
There is guaranteed to be exactly one winning column.
0 ≤ C ≤ 6
Example
Input
.......
.......
.x.....
.ox....
.xox...
.oxo.o.
Output
4
